name: @kaaloo/kimi-platform
description: Letta Code provider mod for Kimi models via the Moonshot AI Platform API (api.moonshot.ai/v1) with dynamic model discovery.
author: Luis Arias

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:bundle: bun build mods/index.ts --target node --outfile /tmp/kimi-platform-bundle-drift-check.mjs && cmp -s /tmp/kimi-platform-bundle-drift-check.mjs mods/index.bundled.mjs && echo 'bundle matches source' || (echo 'BUNDLE DRIFT: mods/index.bundled.mjs does not match source — run npm run build and commit the bundle' && exit 1)
scripts.verify: npm run verify:bundle && npm run typecheck
